steps.title: Locate the median position
steps.content:
There are $31$ values, so the median is the middle value in the sorted data set.
$$\frac{31+1}{2}=16$$
The median is the sixteenth value.

steps.title: Use the frequency table
steps.content: Add the frequencies in increasing temperature order until the running total reaches the sixteenth value. The running total first reaches that position at $33$ degrees Fahrenheit. The answer is 33.
